violations.text: The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The floor in the liquor storage area has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
Various prep unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
The floors in liquor storage has an accumulation rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
A dead rodent was observed in the basement. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
Various prep unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The floors in various locations in the facility have an accumulation rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety registered with RIDOH. Per PIC, application will be submitted. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

Food contact surfaces of the slicer were observed with an accumulation of food debris and rodent droppings. Food contact surfaces of the prep tables in the basement were observed with an accumulation of rodent droppings. Food contact surfaces of the ice machine was observed with an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine was turned off. Ice was disposed of. PIC and staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the food contact surfaces at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by a large accumulation of droppings throughout the establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
Various prep unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving have an accumulation of rodent droppings. Shelving to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The wall in the mop sink area is in poor repair (hole in wall.) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
